title.en: The Multi-Link Element Up Close: Basic, Probe-Request, Reconfiguration, TDLS, and EPCS Variants
title.zh: 拆解多链路元素：Basic、Probe-Request、Reconfiguration、TDLS 与 EPCS 五种变体

blocks.en: Multi-Link Operation (MLO) is the headline feature of Wi-Fi 7 — one logical device (an MLD) bundling several radio links. But all of that machinery has to be negotiated over the air, and almost every word of that conversation rides inside a single information element: the Multi-Link element (clause 9.4.2.322). What makes it clever is that it is not five separate elements. It is one container shape reused for five different jobs, with a 3-bit Type subfield at the front saying which job this copy is doing.
blocks.zh: 多链路操作（MLO）是 Wi-Fi 7 的招牌特性——让一个逻辑设备（MLD）把多条射频链路捆绑在一起。但这一整套机制都必须在空口上协商完成，而这场对话几乎每个字都装在同一个信息元素里：多链路元素（条款 9.4.2.322）。它的巧妙之处在于：它并不是五个互相独立的元素，而是同一种容器外形被复用于五种不同的任务，开头用一个 3 比特的 Type 子字段说明这一份拷贝正在做哪件事。

blocks.en: The outer shell is always the same: the standard Element ID / Length / Element ID Extension header, then a 2-octet Multi-Link Control field, then a Common Info field, then an optional Link Info field. The Multi-Link Control field splits into a 3-bit Type, one reserved bit, and a 12-bit Presence Bitmap. Type picks the variant; the Presence Bitmap then says which optional subfields actually appear in Common Info — so the same byte layout flexes to carry exactly what each job needs and nothing more.
blocks.zh: 外壳始终一致：标准的 Element ID / Length / Element ID Extension 头部，接着是 2 字节的 Multi-Link Control 字段，然后是 Common Info 字段，最后是可选的 Link Info 字段。Multi-Link Control 字段又拆成 3 比特的 Type、1 个保留比特，以及 12 比特的 Presence Bitmap（存在位图）。Type 决定变体；Presence Bitmap 再指明 Common Info 中实际出现了哪些可选子字段——于是同一套字节布局能够伸缩，恰好携带每件任务所需的内容，多一分都不带。

blocks.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 720 200' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12'><g><rect x='10' y='30' width='70' height='34'/><text x='45' y='51' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Elem ID</text><rect x='80' y='30' width='60' height='34'/><text x='110' y='51' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Length</text><rect x='140' y='30' width='70' height='34'/><text x='175' y='47' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Elem ID</text><text x='175' y='60' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Ext</text><rect x='210' y='30' width='150' height='34'/><text x='285' y='51' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Multi-Link Control (2)</text><rect x='360' y='30' width='160' height='34'/><text x='440' y='51' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Common Info</text><rect x='520' y='30' width='190' height='34' stroke-dasharray='5 3'/><text x='615' y='51' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Link Info (optional)</text></g><g><rect x='210' y='120' width='90' height='34'/><text x='255' y='141' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Type (3b)</text><rect x='300' y='120' width='40' height='34'/><text x='320' y='141' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>R</text><rect x='340' y='120' width='180' height='34'/><text x='430' y='141' text-anchor='middle' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Presence Bitmap (12b)</text></g><line x1='210' y1='64' x2='210' y2='120' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><line x1='360' y1='64' x2='520' y2='120' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/></svg>

caption.en: The Multi-Link element shell. The 2-octet Multi-Link Control field expands into Type + Presence Bitmap; Type selects one of five variants.
caption.zh: 多链路元素的外壳。2 字节的 Multi-Link Control 字段展开为 Type + Presence Bitmap；Type 从五种变体中选定一种。

blocks.en: The five jobs map cleanly onto Type values 0 through 4. Type 0 is the Basic variant — the workhorse, advertised during ML discovery and setup, carrying the MLD MAC address, the MLD's capabilities, and one Per-STA Profile per affiliated link. Type 1, Probe Request, lets a scanning STA ask an AP MLD to report specific affiliated links. Type 2, Reconfiguration, announces or requests adding, deleting, or updating links after setup. Type 3, TDLS, reuses the frame for direct station-to-station links. Type 4, EPCS Priority Access, carries the EDCA parameter sets used for emergency priority access. Same shell, five payloads.
blocks.zh: 这五件任务恰好对应 Type 值 0 到 4。Type 0 是 Basic 变体——主力军，在 ML 发现与建链阶段播报，携带 MLD MAC 地址、MLD 的能力，以及每条附属链路一份的 Per-STA Profile。Type 1，Probe Request，让正在扫描的 STA 请求 AP MLD 报告指定的附属链路。Type 2，Reconfiguration，用于在建链之后宣告或请求增加、删除或更新链路。Type 3，TDLS，把这一帧复用于站点到站点的直连链路。Type 4，EPCS Priority Access，携带紧急优先接入所用的 EDCA 参数集。同一个外壳，五种载荷。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
    C[Multi-Link Control: Type subfield 3 bits] --> T0[Type 0: Basic]
    C --> T1[Type 1: Probe Request]
    C --> T2[Type 2: Reconfiguration]
    C --> T3[Type 3: TDLS]
    C --> T4[Type 4: EPCS Priority Access]
    T0 --> B0[MLD MAC + caps + Per-STA Profiles - discovery & setup]
    T1 --> B1[request specific affiliated links]
    T2 --> B2[add / delete / update links]
    T3 --> B3[AP MLD MAC for direct links]
    T4 --> B4[EDCA parameter sets for priority access]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
    C[Multi-Link Control: Type 子字段 3 比特] --> T0[Type 0: Basic]
    C --> T1[Type 1: Probe Request]
    C --> T2[Type 2: Reconfiguration]
    C --> T3[Type 3: TDLS]
    C --> T4[Type 4: EPCS Priority Access]
    T0 --> B0[MLD MAC + 能力 + Per-STA Profile - 发现与建链]
    T1 --> B1[请求指定的附属链路]
    T2 --> B2[增加 / 删除 / 更新链路]
    T3 --> B3[直连用的 AP MLD MAC]
    T4 --> B4[优先接入用的 EDCA 参数集]

blocks.en: The richest variant is Basic. Its Common Info begins with a length byte and the 6-octet MLD MAC Address, then optionally a Link ID Info subfield, a BSS Parameters Change Count, Medium Synchronization Delay info, an EML Capabilities subfield (the EMLSR/EMLMR timing knobs), and the MLD Capabilities And Operations subfield. That last one is the device's MLO resume: it carries Maximum Number Of Simultaneous Links, SRS Support, TID-To-Link Mapping Negotiation Support, a Frequency Separation / AP MLD Type indication, plus newer bits like Link Reconfiguration Operation Support and Aligned TWT Support — each gated on a matching presence bit so an implementation only sends what it actually supports.
blocks.zh: 内容最丰富的变体是 Basic。它的 Common Info 以一个长度字节和 6 字节的 MLD MAC Address 开头，随后可选地带上 Link ID Info 子字段、BSS Parameters Change Count、媒介同步时延信息、EML Capabilities 子字段（EMLSR/EMLMR 的定时旋钮），以及 MLD Capabilities And Operations 子字段。最后这个子字段就是设备的 MLO 简历：它携带最大同时链路数、SRS 支持、TID-到-链路映射协商支持、频率间隔 / AP MLD 类型指示，以及更新的比特位，如链路重配置操作支持、对齐 TWT 支持——每一项都由对应的存在位把关，因此实现只发送它确实支持的内容。

blocks.en: Notice the reuse goes one level deeper. The Reconfiguration variant doesn't redefine its EML Capabilities, MLD Capabilities And Operations, or Extended MLD Capabilities subfields — the standard says they have the same definitions as the Basic variant's. So the container is reused across variants, and individual subfields are reused across those variants too. Learn the Basic layout once and most of the others fall into place.
blocks.zh: 注意这种复用还更深一层。Reconfiguration 变体并不重新定义它的 EML Capabilities、MLD Capabilities And Operations 或 Extended MLD Capabilities 子字段——标准明确说它们与 Basic 变体中的同名子字段定义相同。于是容器在各变体之间被复用，而其中单个子字段也在这些变体之间被复用。把 Basic 的布局学透一次，其余大部分就都能对号入座了。

summary.en: How each variant trims the shell to its job
summary.zh: 每种变体如何把外壳裁剪到适合自己的任务

blocks.en: The standard tailors each variant tightly. The Probe Request variant's Presence Bitmap has only two meaningful bits — AP MLD ID Present and MLD MAC Address Present — and its Common Info is just a length byte plus optionally those two fields; an absent Link Info means 'report all affiliated APs'. The Reconfiguration variant adds a Reconfiguration Operation Type subfield in each Per-STA Profile's STA Control field, encoded per Table 9-417p (0 = AP Removal, 1 = Operation Parameter Update, 2 = Add Link, 3 = Delete Link, 4 = NSTR Status Update), and an AP Removal Timer counted in TBTTs. The TDLS variant is the most stripped down: its entire Presence Bitmap is reserved, its Common Info is only a length byte plus a 6-octet AP MLD MAC Address, and it has no Link Info field at all. The EPCS Priority Access variant also reserves the Presence Bitmap and carries the AP MLD MAC Address, but its Link Info holds one Per-STA Profile per link whose STA Profile optionally contains an EDCA Parameter Set element and/or an MU EDCA Parameter Set element. Five jobs, one element shape, each one carrying only the fields its task requires.
blocks.zh: 标准把每种变体都裁剪得很贴合。Probe Request 变体的 Presence Bitmap 只有两个有意义的比特——AP MLD ID Present 与 MLD MAC Address Present——其 Common Info 也只是一个长度字节加上可选的这两个字段；Link Info 缺席即表示“报告全部附属 AP”。Reconfiguration 变体在每个 Per-STA Profile 的 STA Control 字段里加入了 Reconfiguration Operation Type 子字段，按表 9-417p 编码（0 = 移除 AP，1 = 操作参数更新，2 = 增加链路，3 = 删除链路，4 = NSTR 状态更新），还带一个以 TBTT 计数的 AP Removal Timer。TDLS 变体最为精简：整个 Presence Bitmap 都保留（reserved），其 Common Info 只有一个长度字节加上 6 字节的 AP MLD MAC Address，且完全没有 Link Info 字段。EPCS Priority Access 变体同样保留 Presence Bitmap 并携带 AP MLD MAC Address，但它的 Link Info 中每条链路一份 Per-STA Profile，其 STA Profile 可选地包含一个 EDCA Parameter Set 元素和/或一个 MU EDCA Parameter Set 元素。五件任务，一种元素外形，每一种都只携带其任务所需的字段。

cites.note: 9.4.2.322.1 General — Multi-Link element shell (Figure 9-1074m), Multi-Link Control field with Type + Presence Bitmap (Figure 9-1074n), Type subfield encoding (Table 9-417f)
9.4.2.322.2 Basic Multi-Link element — Presence Bitmap, Common Info layout (Figure 9-1074p), MLD MAC Address, EML Capabilities
MLD Capabilities And Operations subfield (Figure 9-1074s, Table 9-417n) — Maximum Number Of Simultaneous Links, SRS, TID-To-Link Mapping Negotiation, Aligned TWT
9.4.2.322.3 Probe Request Multi-Link element — Presence Bitmap (Figure 9-1074y), Common Info (Figure 9-1074z), Per-STA Profile request
9.4.2.322.4 Reconfiguration Multi-Link element — reused capability subfields, Reconfiguration Operation Type (Table 9-417p), AP Removal Timer
9.4.2.322.5 TDLS and 9.4.2.322.6 EPCS Priority Access Multi-Link elements — reserved Presence Bitmap, AP MLD MAC Address, EDCA / MU EDCA Parameter Set elements
